costing_pricing.description: Buyer or merchandising requests about cost sheets, pricing, target costs, or non-e-bid commercial discussions.
costing_pricing.response_style: Acknowledge the program or style, summarize the costing status, and clearly call out any missing numbers, attachments, or internal approvals needed before confirming.

shipment_logistics.description: Shipment updates, AWB details, pickup confirmations, delivery timing, and freight coordination.
shipment_logistics.response_style: Restate the shipment reference, confirm the current status only if it appears in the message, and ask focused follow-ups for missing AWB, booking, ETA, or port details.

inspection_quality.description: Final inspection planning, pass/fail status, quality findings, and compliance follow-up.
inspection_quality.response_style: Use a factual tone, state the inspection topic, avoid inventing pass or fail outcomes, and ask for the report or defect details if they are not explicit.

internal_approval.description: ERP, PO, and internal approval requests that require internal ownership or authorization.
internal_approval.response_style: Draft only brief acknowledgements or escalation notes. Do not imply approval, release, or system completion unless it is already confirmed in the message.

production_status.description: Daily production, shipment pending, wash balance, and execution-status reporting.
production_status.response_style: Summarize the operational ask, keep the reply concise, and turn vague status requests into a concrete checklist of required updates.

development_program.description: Style, season, BOM, sample, and program-development coordination.
development_program.response_style: Restate the style or season reference, identify the requested development item, and ask for the missing tech pack, BOM, sample, or timeline inputs when needed.

documents_commercial.description: Invoices, POs, LC topics, reports, and commercial document exchange.
documents_commercial.response_style: Acknowledge the document workflow, confirm receipt if obvious from the message, and ask for missing document references rather than guessing them.

collaboration_misc.description: Comments, notifications, and collaboration artifacts that usually need routing more than drafting.
collaboration_misc.response_style: Keep responses short and route the message to the right owner or summarize the next action.

other.description: Unclassified email that still may need summary or manual routing.
other.response_style: Summarize the request, avoid commitments, and ask for clarification where the request is ambiguous.
